---
title: "Uploading A File"
---

---
title: "Uploading a File"
source: "https://support.hyland.com/r/Current/Hyland-Intelligent-Document-Processing-IDP/xuj1745386373085"
section: "Hyland Intelligent Document Processing (IDP)"
---

The Choose Files page enables you to upload documents for processing using Document AI. You can upload a wide range of document types such as, simple forms, invoices, contracts, financial statements, and handwritten notes.

To upload a file,

1.  On the Choose Files page, in the Upload file from your computer area, you can do either of the following to import files:   ![](data:image/gif;base64,)
- Drag and drop relevant files to the Upload file from your computer area.
- Click browse to locate relevant files to be uploaded and then click Open.
- In the Upload files or classes from existing data sources area, you can connect existing data repositories such as, OnBase, Alfresco, Nuxeo, Sharepoint, Perceptive and OneDrive.
- The processing limit for a single batch is 500 documents.
- To skip file upload and navigate directly to the Class page, click Skip File Upload For Now.
2.  The Class page is displayed and document viewer area displays the uploaded files.   ![](data:image/gif;base64,)  Note: The documents are classified under the Others category, by default. For more information on creating classes, see Creating a Class.
